case_title: GAUSE, JAMES vs. DEMPSEY, MAXINE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAUSE, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT DEMPSEY, MAXINE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMPSEY, MAXINE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1780 MCALLISTER ST. #6, S.F. CA. 94115

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2000, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER SHERIFF OF SF COUNTY IS NOT TO REMOVE OR EVICT CLAIMANT. PARTIES STIPULATE IN OPEN COURT SHERIFF IS NOT TO EVICT BEFORE 02/01/00 AT 5:00PM. SO ORDERED. (JUDGE ROBERTSON)
